# Synplix Infotech Services

> Synplix Infotech Services is a web development and product engineering partner for startups, SMBs and SaaS teams. Based in Pune, India, delivering globally.

## About

Synplix builds custom web applications, SaaS platforms, business automation workflows, and content systems. We focus on predictable delivery, long-term scalability, and hands-on partnerships from discovery through production.

## Services

- **Custom Web Applications**: Full-stack web products built for speed, scale and long-term maintainability.
- **SaaS Development**: Multi-tenant SaaS platforms with billing, auth, analytics and admin tooling.
- **Business Automation**: Workflows and integrations that cut manual work across internal systems.
- **Content Systems**: Structured content and growth-ready pages for marketing and product teams.

## How We Work

A six-phase delivery model: Discovery & Strategy, Design & Prototyping, Development, Testing & QA, Launch & Deployment, Support & Growth.

### Timelines

- Marketing website: 2–4 weeks
- MVP web app: 6–8 weeks
- Full SaaS platform: 10–16 weeks
- Proposal turnaround: 48 hours

## Showcase

- **Synplix SaaS** (Beta): Multi-workspace management platform with billing and analytics.
- **Applix Wear**: E-commerce apparel store for a direct-to-consumer fashion brand.
- **CASE**: Student portfolio showcase platform — Code, Access, Share, Everywhere.
- **The Black Sheep Bistro**: Restaurant website with menu, reservations, and reviews (Goa).
- **RMDIOT**: Educational institution website for a polytechnic institute (5 departments, 50+ recruiters).
- **Amora Café**: Café website with digital menu, online ordering, and table reservations (PCMC, Pune).

## Pricing

### Webpage Design (one-time)
- Starter: ₹8,000 (up to 5 pages)
- Growth: ₹18,000 (up to 15 pages, highlighted)
- Enterprise: Custom quote

### Content Creation (monthly)
- Basic: ₹5,000/month
- Pro: ₹12,000/month (highlighted)
- Agency: ₹25,000/month

### SaaS Subscription
- Free: ₹0
- Starter: ₹499/month
- Pro: ₹999/month (highlighted)
- Enterprise: ₹1,999/month

Payment terms: 50% deposit before project commencement, balance due on completion or milestones. Invoices payable within 7 business days.

## FAQ

- Projects typically take 2–4 weeks (marketing site), 6–8 weeks (MVP), or 10–16 weeks (full SaaS).
- Start by booking a free 30-minute strategy call. Written proposal within 48 hours.
- 50% deposit required, balance on completion. Prices in INR unless specified.
- Upon full payment, all custom code, designs and assets transfer to the client.
- We work with clients globally, including US and UK alongside India.

## Technical Details

- Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS
- Hosting: Vercel
- Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
